name: @nexarail/devnet-client
description: NexaRail RC1 devnet read-only client + command builders. LOCAL DEVNET ONLY. NOT for mainnet.

scripts.check: node -e "import('./src/client.js').then(m => { console.log('OK:'); const names = Object.keys(m).filter(k => !k.startsWith('_')).join(', '); console.log('  exports:', names); })"
